description:
This quiz assesses knowledge of modern CSS concepts and best practices, gauging both foundational and advanced skills through multiple‑choice questions. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty level with a light, encouraging tone that nudges learners to consider CSS as a résumé‑worthy skill.
Topics: CSS fundamentals, Modern layout techniques (Flexbox, Grid), Responsive design, CSS preprocessors and variables, Browser compatibility
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and anyone preparing for technical interviews who wants to validate or improve their CSS proficiency.
